<!--
Thanks for the contribution! A few quick checks help merging go smoothly.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph or a few bullets covering what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify the change? Pasting console output is fine. -->

- [ ] `python tests/test_parser.py` passes against the .edm fixtures.
- [ ] Manually tested an import in Blender (specify version: ___).
- [ ] Added/updated tests covering the change.
- [ ] Added/updated docs (README, `docs/`, `wiki/`).

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything tricky to call out? Trade-offs you want feedback on? -->
